Order To Show Cause Re: Sale Of Real Property Containing A Dwelling
Off Calendar Apr-09-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Linda Chan, Esq., specially appearing for Plaintiff & moving party: The Best Service Co.
No appearances made by Defendant.

RULING: Judgment Creditor's Application For Order To Sell Real Property Containing A Dwelling is GRANTED. Order was signed in open court. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. NOT REPORTED.

Application For Order To Sell Real Property Containing A Dwelling
Off Calendar Apr-09-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Linda Chan, Esq., specially appearing for Plaintiff & moving party: The Best Service Co.
No appearances made by Defendant.

RULING: Judgment Creditor's Application For Order To Sell Real Property Containing A Dwelling is GRANTED. Order was signed in open court. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. NOT REPORTED.
